steps.title: Find the requested goal
steps.content: The student wants a generalization about ultramarathons, so the sentence should make a broad statement about the category rather than simply list or compare individual races.

steps.title: Generalize from both examples
steps.content: The notes show one ultramarathon that is 37.3 miles and another that is 261 miles, supporting the broad claim that ultramarathons vary widely in length. A only lists examples, B compares one ultramarathon with a marathon, and D contrasts race duration rather than length. The answer is C.
